name: USS De Haven (ii) (DD 727)
events: 11 Jul 1944 USS De Haven (Cdr. John B. Dimmick) departed from Norfolk bound for the Pacific.
16 Jul 1944 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) transits the Panama Canal.
25 Jul 1944 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) arrived at San Diego, California.
28 Jul 1944 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) departed from San Diego bound for Pearl Harbor.
3 Aug 1944 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) arrived at Pearl Harbor.
16 Aug 1944 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) departed from Pearl Harbor bound for Eniwetok.
30 Aug 1944 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) returns at Pearl Harbor.
28 Sep 1944 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) departed from Pearl Harbor again bound for Eniwetok.
5 Oct 1944 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) arrived at Eniwetok. She left a week later bound for Ulithi to join TF 38.
2 Nov 1944 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) departed from Ulithi with TF 38.
10 Dec 1944 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) departed from Ulithi again with TF 38.
23 Dec 1944 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) arrived back at Ulithi.
30 Dec 1944 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) departed from Ulithi with TF 38.
26 Jan 1945 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) returns to Ulithi.
10 Feb 1945 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) departed from Ulithi with TF 58.
4 Mar 1945 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) returns to Ulithi.
14 Mar 1945 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) departed from Ulithi with the fleet.
27 Apr 1945 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) departed from the Okinawa area bound for Ulithi.
9 May 1945 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) departed from Ulithi again the TF 58.
13 Jun 1945 USS De Haven (Cdr. J.B. Dimmick) arrived at Leyte, Philippines.
1 Jul 1945 USS De Haven (Cdr. William Heald Groverman, JR.) departed from Leyte with TF 38.
2 Sep 1945 USS De Haven (Cdr. William Heald Groverman, JR.) enters Tokyo Bay.
